ai_tips: Starting out at 13m — 3.01km ahead with 33m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔13米出发——全程3.01公里，累计爬升33米。
0.28km in — pace 3:37/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.28公里——配速3:37/公里，强度正在建立。
Halfway to the high point — 0m of the 5m climb done, grade here 0%. Short, quick steps keep this efficient. 爬升至最高点过半——5米总爬升已完成0米，此处坡度0%。缩小步幅、加快步频会更省力。
High point of the route: 18m at 0.95km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点18米，位于0.95公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -21.4% at 1.22km — you let it flow at 4:54/km, good downhill confidence. 全天最陡的下坡：1.22公里处坡度-21.4%——你顺势加速到4:54/公里，下坡信心不错。
2.81km — late-run check: pace walk/km, effort showing as the pace slips. 2.81公里——后程检查：配速walk/公里，疲劳显现，配速下滑。
Finished 3.01km in 18:18 (avg 6:05/km, +33m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成3.01公里，用时18:18（平均配速6:05/公里，爬升33米）。全程稳定扎实。
